artifacts.description: Removed IRR case from derivation_subst (eliminated 1 sorry)
Removed IRR cases and IRRSoundness import
Removed IRR cases from substDerivation and liftDerivationWith
Completed fresh_Gp_seed_consistent proof. 3 sorries remain: exists_fresh_for_g_content, fresh_for_g_content_some_decided_false, naming_set_consistent (legacy).
Phase 4 analysis and proof strategy handoff
Phase 4-5 analysis - Phase 5 blocked on architectural decision
Updated plan with Phase 4 PARTIAL, Phase 5 BLOCKED status

partial_progress.details: Phase 4 key theorem fresh_Gp_seed_consistent PROVEN. Phase 5 BLOCKED: discovered that call site refactoring requires architectural decision on order structure (Preorder vs PartialOrder quotient). The issue is that canonicalR_irreflexive is used to derive strictness via lt_of_canonicalR, which is FALSE under reflexive semantics.

blocking_issue.summary: Phase 5 requires replacing lt_of_canonicalR with per-witness strictness, but ~30 call sites assume CanonicalR implies strict order
options: Option 1: Change Preorder to PartialOrder quotient
Option 2: Weaken TemporalCoherentFamily.forward_F to use non-strict inequality
Option 3: Add explicit strictness predicates to witness constructions
blocking_issue.recommendation: Option 3 with selective fix - use existsTask_strict_fresh_atom for completeness proofs

key_insights: fresh_Gp_seed_consistent Case 1: if L' ⊢ ¬G(q), then G(¬G(q)) ∈ M via generalized K + T-axiom
G(¬G(q)) ∈ M means ¬G(q) ∈ g_content(M), contradicting q's freshness
lt_of_canonicalR is FALSE under reflexive semantics when M = N
Even M ≠ N doesn't ensure strictness: CanonicalR M N ∧ CanonicalR N M is possible
Per-witness strictness works via fresh G-atom construction

verification.notes: Build passes (1044 jobs). Key theorem fresh_Gp_seed_consistent proven. Phase 5 blocked pending architectural decision.

review_reason: Phase 5 (call site refactoring) is BLOCKED. Requires decision on order structure: (1) quotient to PartialOrder, (2) weaken coherence conditions, or (3) add explicit strictness predicates. Recommend Option 3 for minimal disruption.

analysis_this_session: Examined Phase 5 call sites (~30 uses of canonicalR_irreflexive)
Discovered lt_of_canonicalR is unsound under reflexive semantics
